response:
<<path to light>>
meera rises with dawn to build a future
her mind sharp and her heart full of hope
community hands lift her toward new horizons
systemic barriers crumble under unity and strength
she learns to lead and inspire others around her
no threats can stop the fire of her determination
the slums transform into a hub of innovation
every person finds a way to thrive and grow
hope blooms where despair once tried to live
meera proves that no circumstance is final
<<path to light>>
